use_cases: Photo galleries and scrapbook-style image displays with playful tilted layouts
Portfolio showcases with asymmetric bento grid arrangements
Feature or product showcases with varied card sizes and rotations
Dashboard layouts with mixed content card grids
Creative content displays for blogs, magazines, or social platforms
ai_summary: A reusable bento grid item component designed for scrapbook-themed layouts. The component supports customizable CSS rotation via a style variable, allowing for playful, hand-crafted asymmetric arrangements typical of scrapbook aesthetics. Intended as part of a bento grid system for creating visually dynamic content displays with varied card rotations and sizes.
